title: Coinbase’s model-routing strategy shows AI pricing pressure in practice
friendlyTitle: Coinbase is using cheaper AI models more carefully
summary: Coinbase is reportedly using cheaper models such as GLM 5.2 and Kimi 2.7, automatic routing, and improved caching to cut AI spending while token usage continues rising.
friendlySummary: Coinbase is reported to be saving money by sending different AI tasks to different models and improving caching.
whyItMatters: Enterprises are learning that AI budgets can be managed through routing, caching, and context discipline rather than simply buying the most expensive frontier model for every task. That puts pressure on labs to compete on price-performance, not just benchmark headlines.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This shows a useful pattern for many teams: match the model to the task, keep context smaller, and avoid paying premium prices every time.
